one_line_ask: Turn the client's raw studio shot of a modern silver rosary necklace into a full commercial product package: a retouched hero image on a clean sweep, a vector line-art spec, a screen-print-style halftone tech graphic, and a print-ready data-merged spec sheet — all assembled into a review board for revision rounds.
brief:
We sell handcrafted sterling silver religious jewelry and have just finalized a new MODERN-style rosary necklace (clean geometric links, minimal crucifix, brushed-silver finish). I shot it on my bench under mixed lighting and need a freelancer to build the full commercial product package we can use across our store listing, lookbook, a stamped/printed merch concept, and our wholesale line sheet.

Deliverables:
1. A retouched HERO image of the rosary: straightened, auto-toned, exposure/highlight balanced so the brushed silver reads true (not yellow-cast), the subject isolated, dropped onto a clean neutral studio sweep, with the canvas extended to a roomy 4:5 e-commerce frame and a soft blurred-background depth look. Deliver a polished JPEG and the cut-out transparent PNG.
2. A clean VECTOR line-art / silhouette of the necklace (SVG) we can scale for stamping, embroidery, and the modern logo-lockup spec sheet.
3. A screen-print / halftone TECH GRAPHIC of the rosary (single-tone, print-screen look) for a tote/tee merch mockup and our stamping vendor.
4. A print-ready PRODUCT SPEC SHEET: take our authored InDesign spec-sheet template and our SKU CSV (material, chain length, crucifix si
